/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libabsl_kernel_timeout_internal.so.2407.0.0 -o libabsl_kernel_timeout_internal.so.2407.0.0 CMakeFiles/kernel_timeout_internal.dir/internal/kernel_timeout.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../time:\$ORIGIN/../strings:\$ORIGIN/../numeric:\$ORIGIN/../base:" ../time/libabsl_time.so.2407.0.0 ../time/libabsl_civil_time.so.2407.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_strings.so.2407.0.0 ../numeric/libabsl_int128.so.2407.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_strings_internal.so.2407.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_string_view.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_base.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_throw_delegate.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_log_severity.so.2407.0.0 ../time/libabsl_time_zone.so.2407.0.0 -lpthread
